payload.label: coffee maker
payload.long_description: Small black glossy single-serve coffee maker (pod-style) with a vertical blue translucent water reservoir/window, top hinged lid and silver accents; the base is partly cropped at the bottom of the image and the unit appears to be a compact countertop appliance approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"coffee maker","short_description":"black glossy single-serve brewer","long_description":"Small black glossy single-serve coffee maker (pod-style) with a vertical blue translucent water reservoir/window, top hinged lid and silver accents; the base is partly cropped at the bottom of the image and the unit appears to be a compact countertop appliance approximately 0.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["black plastic body","glossy reflective finish","single-serve/pod-style design","blue translucent water window","top hinged lid","silver/metallic accents","compact cylindrical shape","base partially cropped by image","small countertop appliance"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.5}
